summary: Dan Shapiro enthusiastically recommends a deal on Two Cherries chisels, a well-regarded woodworking tool brand. He directs readers to compare regular pricing against a deeply discounted set of four chisels available for under $60. The post is a brief, no-frills buying recommendation rooted in his personal woodworking hobby. It references a prior post where he researched chisel options in detail.
key_points: Two Cherries chisels are a quality woodworking tool worth investing in
The recommended set offers significant savings compared to individual or gift set pricing
The only tradeoff is unpolished backs, which doesn't affect sharpness
money_quotes: Drop everything and buy these chisels, now.
key_insight: When you find a great deal on quality tools, act fast and share it with fellow makers.
